objective: Play a search result identified by a CandidateRef from a prior music.search.results OperationResult artifact. Validates liveness preconditions (window_ref) before clicking, then activates the row by index via debug.clickWindowRow (visual-band detection, no text OCR required). The caller must extract row_index from the chosen Candidate.target_spec.row_index before invoking this recipe.

source_run_id.note: run_id of the run that produced the OperationResult candidate-set artifact.

source_artifact_id.note: artifact_id of the OperationResult JSON within source_run_id. Default is artifact_0003 (music.search.results always produces it at index 3).

candidate_local_id.note: candidate_local_id within the OperationResult to validate and play.

target_row_index.note: Caller-extracted 1-based row index from Candidate.target_spec.row_index. Passed directly to debug.clickWindowRow.

preconditions: QQ音乐 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
source_run_id and source_artifact_id point to a valid OperationResult from music.search.results.
target_row_index has been extracted by the caller from the chosen Candidate.target_spec.row_index.
The search result surface must still be visible (not navigated away) when this recipe runs.

notes: Play press (debug.smartPress) may take the AX path (no pointer disturbance) or fall back to pointer.

expected_signals: debug.clickWindowRow confirms the row was found and clicked in the window (rows.clicked_index matches target_row_index).
debug.smartPress completes for the play control via AX or pointer fallback.
debug.verifyNowPlayingTitle confirms ${target_title} from the AX tree.
success_criteria: The result row is activated through window-scoped visual-band row detection.
The current now-playing title is verified through the AX tree.
non_goals: This recipe does not perform the initial search — it consumes an already-produced OperationResult.
This recipe does not select which candidate to play — that decision is made by the caller.
This recipe does not prove generalized playback for arbitrary row indices.
This recipe does not use OCR text anchors for row activation (visual-band detection is used instead).

known_limits.caller_must_extract_row_index: The caller (agent) must read the OperationResult artifact and extract row_index from the chosen Candidate.target_spec.row_index before invoking this recipe.
known_limits.visual_row_index_stability: Row index is detected from the current visual state. If the result list scrolls or reorders between music.search.results and this recipe, the row_index may point to a different song.
known_limits.liveness_window_ref_only: For VisualRow candidates produced by QQ音乐, anchor_recheck is not set (window-level OCR cannot see WebView content). Liveness is checked via window_ref only (app running with visible windows).
